2605.02827.title: First-Order Efficiency for Probabilistic Value Estimation via A Statistical Viewpoint
2605.02827.paper_summary: Probabilistic values, including Shapley values and semivalues, provide a model-agnostic framework to attribute the behavior of a black-box model to data points or features, with a wide range of applications including explainable artificial intelligence and data valuation. However, their exact computation requires utility evaluations over exponentially many coalitions, making Monte Carlo approximation essential in modern machine learning applications. Existing estimators are often developed through different identification strategies, including weighted averages, self-normalized weighting, regression adjustment, and weighted least squares. Our key observation is that these seemingly distinct constructions share a common first-order error structure, in which the leading term is an augmented inverse-probability weighted influence term determined by the sampling law and a working surrogate function. This first-order representation yields an explicit expression for the leading mean squared error (MSE), which characterizes how the sampling law and the surrogate jointly determine statistical efficiency. Guided by this criterion, we propose an Efficiency-Aware Surrogate-adjusted Estimator (EASE) that directly chooses the sampling law and surrogate to minimize the first-order MSE. We demonstrate that EASE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art estimators for various probabilistic values.
2605.02827.paper_summary_zh: 概率值，包括Shapley值和半值，提供了一種與模型無關的框架，用於將黑箱模型的行為歸因於數據點或特徵，應用範圍廣泛，包括可解釋的人工智慧和數據估值。<lb/>然而，它們的精確計算需要對指數級多個聯盟進行效用評估，這使得蒙特卡羅近似在現代機器學習應用中變得至關重要。<lb/>現有的估計量通常通過不同的識別策略開發，包括加權平均、自我標準化加權、回歸調整和加權最小二乘法。<lb/>我們的關鍵觀察是，這些看似不同的構造共享一個共同的一階誤差結構，其中主導項是一個增強的逆概率加權影響項，由抽樣法則和一個工作代理函數決定。<lb/>這一階表示法產生了主導均方誤差（MSE）的明確表達式，該表達式描述了抽樣法則和代理如何共同決定統計效率。<lb/>根據這一標準，我們提出了一種效率感知的代理調整估計量（EASE），該估計量直接選擇抽樣法則和代理，以最小化一階MSE。<lb/>我們證明EASE在各種概率值的情況下始終優於最先進的估計量。
2605.02827.author: Ziqi Liu et.al.
2605.02827.authors: Ziqi Liu, Kiljae Lee, Yuan Zhang, Weijing Tang
